problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to colonize, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
